effects of planetary transit are not expected to be very good.
As this Astakavarga is to be made use of for various purposes
such as computing longevity, health, happiness. Yogas etc.
certain rectifications are necessary before the benefic dots arc
taken into consideration. Such rectifications are two in number
viz. (1) Trikonasodhana i.e. correction for the trincs. and
(2) Fkadhipatya Sodhana. i.e. correction for common ownership.
Let us take the first one now. You know that among the 12
Rasis there arc four sets of trines. Aries. ! co and Sagittarius
forming one group; Taurus. Virgo and Capricorn the second:
Gemini. Libra and Aquarius the third: and lastly Cancer, Scorpio
and Pisces the fourth. At a time you can consider only those
Rasis that constitute one group of trines. Now remember the
following four rules for the correction of the number of benefic
